summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in colocation and build layers, led by Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Telangana, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh, with policy tailwinds from state data centre laws and power open access. The top India policy hook is the policy hook is state-level data centre policy momentum, especially in UP and Gujarat. Value-chain movers are colocation and build, driven by hyperscaler expansion. Foreign hyperscalers are actively scaling in India, with Microsoft, AWS, Meta, Oracle, and Amazon leading new signals and filings this run.
